hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && OUTPUT=$(pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && pnpm --filter criticseven-client typecheck 2>&1 && pnpm lint 2>&1 && pnpm test 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ]; then REASON=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | tail -80 | jq -Rs .); echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":$REASON}"; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running server typecheck, client typecheck, lint, and tests (foreground — background hangs on mongodb-memory-server)...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */eslint.config.mjs|eslint.config.mjs|*/tsconfig.json|tsconfig.json|*/.claude/settings.json|.claude/settings.json|*/CLAUDE.md|CLAUDE.md) echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Config changes require explicit user approval — fix the code, not the linter.\"}}";; esac; }
